name: Nana's Sugar Cookies--Birr
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sour Milk (mix 2 tbsp vinegar with 1/2 cup milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. Dissolve baking soda in sour milk.
4. Add the sour milk mixture to the butter-sugar-egg mixture, then add the baking powder.
5. Gradually mix in the flour until a dough forms.
6. Roll out the dough on a floured surface and cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Place the cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes or until lightly golden around the edges.
9. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely before decorating with sugar if desired.
